fullstack.title: FitProAdmin
fullstack.description: Complete platform for gym and club management, centralizing clients, payments, routines, metrics, members, and follow-ups, with a client app.
stack: Frontend: Vue 3, Inertia.js, TailwindCSS, Vite, Axios, dayjs
Backend: Laravel 11, Jetstream, Sanctum, MercadoPago DX PHP, Laravel Notifications, Laravel Tinker
Spatie packages: permission, activitylog, medialibrary, tags
Testing / DevOps: PHPUnit, Mockery, Laravel Pint, Faker
highlights: Tailor-made: built from scratch and 100% adapted to the business
Modular and scalable, designed to grow and adapt to multiple clients
Full payment and advanced roles integration
Multitenant architecture completely isolated per client
Strategic architectural and modular decisions for functionality and maintainability
learnings: Design a useful, practical, and sellable SaaS iterating over mistakes and improvements
Optimize navigation and user experience for complex systems
Integrate robust third-party packages without reinventing the wheel
Modularize code and build multitenant architecture for scalability
Make strategic technical decisions focused on functionality and maintainability
Create a product that can evolve into derivative micro-SaaS

fullstack.title: Nutrisaas
fullstack.description: MicroSaaS for nutritionists to manage clients, plans, and nutritional follow-ups.
stack: Frontend: Vue 3, Inertia.js, TailwindCSS, Vite, Axios
Testing / DevOps: PHPUnit, Mockery, Laravel Pint
highlights: Interfaz ligera, intuitiva y fácil de usar
Permite gestionar clientes, planes y seguimiento de manera eficiente
Escalable a micro-SaaS para varios profesionales
learnings: Adaptar un SaaS a un nicho específico y crear valor inmediato
Optimizar la experiencia del usuario para un flujo de trabajo claro
Aprender sobre modularización y micro-SaaS a pequeña escala
Integrar funcionalidades de seguimiento y notificaciones efectivas
